zh.lifeSummary: 當King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red於1080年出生在曼島時，他的父親Godred "Crovan" Haraldsson  King of the Isle of Man and of Dublin41歲，母親Queen Ragnhild Maria Haraldsdottir33歲。他於1135年之前與Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney在曼島結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1153年6月29日在蘇格蘭阿吉爾享年73歲，埋葬在曼島。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red于1080年出生在曼岛时，他的父亲Godred "Crovan" Haraldsson  King of the Isle of Man and of Dublin41岁，母亲Queen Ragnhild Maria Haraldsdottir33岁。他于1135年之前与Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney在曼岛结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1153年6月29日在苏格兰阿吉爾享年73岁，埋葬在曼岛。

nameMeanings.name: Óláfr
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from an Old Norse personal name composed of the elements anu ‘ancestor’ + leifr ‘heir, descendant’. St Olaf , King of Norway ( 995–1030 ), aided the spread of Christianity in his kingdom. The name was introduced to Britain before the Norman Conquest, but modern use as a given name in the English-speaking world originated in America, where it was taken by recent Scandinavian immigrants.

en.lifeSummary: When King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red was born in 1080, in Isle of Man, his father, Godred "Crovan" Haraldsson  King of the Isle of Man and of Dublin, was 41 and his mother, Queen Ragnhild Maria Haraldsdottir, was 33. He married Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney before 1135, in Isle of Man. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 29 June 1153, in Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 73, and was buried in Isle of Man.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red est né en 1080, à Île de Man, son père, Godred "Crovan" Haraldsson  King of the Isle of Man and of Dublin, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Queen Ragnhild Maria Haraldsdottir, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney avant 1135, à Île de Man. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 29 juin 1153, à Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Île de Man.

de.Orkney, Orkney Islands, Scotland: Orkney Islands, Orkney, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red 1080 in Isle of Man geboren wurde, war sein Vater Godred "Crovan" Haraldsson  King of the Isle of Man and of Dublin 41 und seine Mutter Queen Ragnhild Maria Haraldsdottir 33. Er hat vor 1135 in Isle of Man Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 29. Juni 1153 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Isle of Man begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red è nato il nel 1080 nel Isola di Man, il suo padre, Godred "Crovan" Haraldsson  King of the Isle of Man and of Dublin, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Queen Ragnhild Maria Haraldsdottir, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney prima del 1135, nel Isola di Man. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 29 giugno 1153, nel Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Isola di Man.

ja.lifeSummary: King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Redが1080年にマン島で生まれた時，父Godred "Crovan" Haraldsson  King of the Isle of Man and of Dublinは41歳，母Queen Ragnhild Maria Haraldsdottirは33歳であった。1135年以前にマン島でIngeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1153年6月29日にスコットランドアルグイルで73歳で死去し，マン島にて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red(이)가 1080년 맨섬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Godred "Crovan" Haraldsson  King of the Isle of Man and of Dublin(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Queen Ragnhild Maria Haraldsdottir(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1135년 이전 맨섬에서 Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1153년 6월 29일 스컷랜드 아그이에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 맨섬에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red nasceu em 1080, em Ilha de Man, seu pai, Godred "Crovan" Haraldsson  King of the Isle of Man and of Dublin, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Queen Ragnhild Maria Haraldsdottir, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney antes 1135, em Ilha de Man. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de junho de 1153, em Argyll, Scotland, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Ilha de Man.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red родился в 1080 г. в местности Остров Мэн, его отцу по имени Godred "Crovan" Haraldsson  King of the Isle of Man and of Dublin было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Queen Ragnhild Maria Haraldsdottir, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney перед 1135 г. в местности Остров Мэн. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 29 июня 1153 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности Остров Мэн.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red nació en 1080, en Isla de Man, su papá, Godred "Crovan" Haraldsson  King of the Isle of Man and of Dublin, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Queen Ragnhild Maria Haraldsdottir, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney antes de 1135, en Isla de Man. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 29 de junio de 1153, en Argyll, Scotland, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Isla de Man.
